# AI Agent Security Guardrails and Procedures

A living framework for keeping AI agents honest, safe, and accountable, built one careful decision at a time.

## Overview

This repository documents a STRIDE based threat review of the OWASP Juice Shop web application, performed with the help of AI agents. It includes:

* **CLAUDE.md**: guidance and operating instructions used by the AI agent during this project
* **stride-threat-model.md**: the STRIDE threat modeling framework applied to OWASP Juice Shop
* **threat.md**: the threat review output generated by the agents based on that framework
* **.gitignore**: exclusions to keep sensitive or unnecessary files out of version control

## Purpose

This project was built as a personal learning exercise to practice applying structured threat modeling to a real, intentionally vulnerable web application (OWASP Juice Shop), using AI agents as part of the workflow.

## Acknowledgments

This project was built as part of hands on learning through a Udemy course on AI agent security. The STRIDE threat modeling methodology follows what was taught in that course, adapted and applied here with my own AI agents.

This repository reflects personal learning and practice. It is not an official, professional, or vetted security policy.
